post.title: From Solo Data Scientist to Functional Organisation
post.description: A comprehensive guide for scaling data teams from a single contributor to a full organisation, with specific hiring priorities, role definitions, and common pitfalls to avoid.
post.excerpt: When building out a data team, it's important to have the foundations in place. There's little point in hiring expensive Data Science…
